languages.text:
{n}По стойке смирно — неуклюжей, как и его угловатая фигура, — перед вами вытягивается долговязый паренек. С такой длинной шеей, словно к плечам подвесили парящий {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочереп{/g}.{/n}
"Р-рядовой Рубан Хрошовач! Разрешаю… ой, разрешите приветствовать!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}По стойке смирно — неуклюжей, как и его угловатая фигура, — перед вами вытягивается долговязый паренек. С такой длинной шеей, словно к плечам подвесили парящий {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочереп{/g}.{/n}
"Р-рядовой Рубан Хрошовач! Разрешаю… ой, разрешите приветствовать!"

languages.text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"
languages.original_text:
{n}По стойке смирно — неуклюжей, как и его угловатая фигура, — перед вами вытягивается долговязый паренек. С такой длинной шеей, словно к плечам подвесили парящий {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочереп{/g}.{/n}
"Р-рядовой Рубан Хрошовач! Разрешаю… ой, разрешите приветствовать!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

languages.text:
{n}一个瘦骨伶仃、笨手笨脚的年轻小伙子在你面前努力立正站好，不过他那笨拙的身形实在不太配合。他的脖子长得出奇，脑袋活像个{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}似的悬在肩膀上方。{/n}
“列、列兵鲁班·霍罗什维奇！请求——呃，请求敬礼！”
languages.original_text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}一个瘦骨伶仃、笨手笨脚的年轻小伙子在你面前努力立正站好，不过他那笨拙的身形实在不太配合。他的脖子长得出奇，脑袋活像个{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}似的悬在肩膀上方。{/n}
“列、列兵鲁班·霍罗什维奇！请求——呃，请求敬礼！”

languages.text:
{n}Un jeune homme dégingandé, au cou si long que sa tête fait penser à un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} flottant au-dessus de ses épaules, se met maladroitement au garde-à-vous lorsque vous approchez.{/n}
« S-Soldat Ruban Khroshovach ! Persimmion... euh, permission de saluer ! »
languages.original_text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}Un jeune homme dégingandé, au cou si long que sa tête fait penser à un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} flottant au-dessus de ses épaules, se met maladroitement au garde-à-vous lorsque vous approchez.{/n}
« S-Soldat Ruban Khroshovach ! Persimmion... euh, permission de saluer ! »

languages.text: {n}Sıska figürünün ima ettiği kadar beceriksizce bir şekilde esas duruşa geçmiş olan genç bir adam, sırık misali önünde dikiliyor. Boynu o kadar uzun ki kafası omuzlarının üzerinde süzülen bir {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmeleti{/g} andırıyor.{/n} "E... Er Ruban Khroshovach! Selam ferme... Verme izni istiyorum!"
languages.original_text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Sıska figürünün ima ettiği kadar beceriksizce bir şekilde esas duruşa geçmiş olan genç bir adam, sırık misali önünde dikiliyor. Boynu o kadar uzun ki kafası omuzlarının üzerinde süzülen bir {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmeleti{/g} andırıyor.{/n} "E... Er Ruban Khroshovach! Selam ferme... Verme izni istiyorum!"

languages.text:
{n}En posición firme frente a ti, con la torpeza que sugiere su cuerpo desgarbado, se encuentra un joven larguirucho con un cuello tan alargado que su cabeza parece un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} que flota sobre sus hombros.{/n}
«¡S-soldado Ruban Khroshovach! ¡Premiso para... ah, permiso para saludar!».
languages.original_text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}En posición firme frente a ti, con la torpeza que sugiere su cuerpo desgarbado, se encuentra un joven larguirucho con un cuello tan alargado que su cabeza parece un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} que flota sobre sus hombros.{/n}
«¡S-soldado Ruban Khroshovach! ¡Premiso para... ah, permiso para saludar!».

languages.text:
{n}Vor dir steht ein schlaksiger junger Mann unbeholfen stramm, dessen Kopf einem über seinen Schultern schwebenden {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} gleicht.{/n}
"E-einfacher Soldat Ruban Khroshovach! Erbitte Prämiss ... äh, Permiss, zu salutieren!"
languages.original_text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}Vor dir steht ein schlaksiger junger Mann unbeholfen stramm, dessen Kopf einem über seinen Schultern schwebenden {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} gleicht.{/n}
"E-einfacher Soldat Ruban Khroshovach! Erbitte Prämiss ... äh, Permiss, zu salutieren!"

languages.text:
{n}あなたの前で、その長身でぎこちない姿が示唆するような不器用さで正座しているのは、首が長く、頭が肩の上で浮いているような{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}サーボスカル{/g}のような若者だ。{/n}
「パー、パーヴィート・ルバン・クロショヴァチ！許可を…あ、敬礼の許可を！」
languages.original_text:
{n}Standing at attention before you — as clumsily as his gawky figure would suggest — is a gangling young fellow, with a neck so long, his head looks like a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} floating above his shoulders.{/n}
"P-private Ruban Khroshovach! Persimmon to— ack, permission to salute!"
